key_drivers: Broader dollar weakness continues to support non-USD FX, commodities, and duration-sensitive risk assets.
Fresh FRED data showed tighter HY spreads and a steeper 2s10s curve, materially improving the cyclicals and small-cap backdrop.
Volatility remains balanced while copper strength reinforces the pro-growth signal for silver and AUD.
